summary: R51a1 checker-predicate design seed; product checker NOT_RUN.
requires: associated requirement origin is coherent
witness/conformance environment is deterministic
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the declared descriptor shape as design documentation only
record WherePredicateAdmitted requires and candidate diagnostic vocabulary without executing a checker decision
emit no diagnostic and create no product execution receipt while predicate_maturity is design_seed
promote only after a closed terminating algorithm plus discriminating positive/negative fixtures is independently reviewed
termination_metric: finite descriptor size plus strictly decreasing dependency DAG rank
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic

summary: ordered branch 1: a missing witness_id, implementation_id, coherence_key, or empty candidate_implementation_ids emits WITNESS_COHERENCE_EVIDENCE_MISSING; ordered branch 2: coherence_key unequal to witness_id, or candidate_implementation_ids has exactly one element and that sole candidate is unequal to implementation_id, emits WITNESS_IMPLEMENTATION_SELECTION_MISMATCH; ordered branch 3: more than one candidate implementation emits WITNESS_DUPLICATE_IN_COHERENCE_DOMAIN; ordered branch 4: orphan_rule_admitted is false or declaring_package equals neither type_owner nor trait_owner emits WITNESS_ORPHAN_RULE_VIOLATION; only after all four branches pass is the witness/implementation pair coherent
requires: ordered branch 1: a missing witness_id, implementation_id, coherence_key, or empty candidate_implementation_ids emits WITNESS_COHERENCE_EVIDENCE_MISSING

ordered branch 2: coherence_key unequal to witness_id, or candidate_implementation_ids has exactly one element and that sole candidate is unequal to implementation_id, emits WITNESS_IMPLEMENTATION_SELECTION_MISMATCH
ordered branch 3: more than one candidate implementation emits WITNESS_DUPLICATE_IN_COHERENCE_DOMAIN
ordered branch 4: orphan_rule_admitted is false or declaring_package equals neither type_owner nor trait_owner emits WITNESS_ORPHAN_RULE_VIOLATION
only after all four branches pass is the witness/implementation pair coherent
preconditions: ordered branch 1: a missing witness_id, implementation_id, coherence_key, or empty candidate_implementation_ids emits WITNESS_COHERENCE_EVIDENCE_MISSING

ordered branch 2: coherence_key unequal to witness_id, or candidate_implementation_ids has exactly one element and that sole candidate is unequal to implementation_id, emits WITNESS_IMPLEMENTATION_SELECTION_MISMATCH
ordered branch 3: more than one candidate implementation emits WITNESS_DUPLICATE_IN_COHERENCE_DOMAIN
ordered branch 4: orphan_rule_admitted is false or declaring_package equals neither type_owner nor trait_owner emits WITNESS_ORPHAN_RULE_VIOLATION
only after all four branches pass is the witness/implementation pair coherent
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the closed RCTS-V5 descriptor
evaluate dependency predicates left-to-right and propagate the dependency's selected diagnostic unchanged
evaluate WitnessCoherent diagnostic_dispatch conditions once in their declared deterministic order
emit only the diagnostic selected by the first matching condition (or its declared advisory lint), never the entire secondary_diagnostics list; otherwise return success
termination_metric: finite descriptor size plus strictly decreasing dependency DAG rank
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic

summary: resolve conformance obligations deterministically without structural or extension auto-witness
requires: resolve conformance obligations deterministically without structural or extension auto-witness
preconditions: resolve conformance obligations deterministically without structural or extension auto-witness
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the closed RCTSDescriptorV5 and its native conditional constraints
evaluate declared dependency predicates left-to-right and propagate their selected diagnostic
enumerate visible nominal conformance candidates by canonical coherence key
exclude extension, structural, local runtime, and named nonautomatic candidates
filter orphan/visibility/conditional obligations
zero emits TRAIT_MISSING_WITNESS; more than one emits TRAIT_AMBIGUOUS_IMPORTED_WITNESS; one returns sealed evidence
emit only the first diagnostic selected by the declared deterministic order; otherwise admit
termination_metric: finite normalized descriptor plus a strictly decreasing dependency/obligation DAG with a visited-key set
evaluation_order: schema -> normalization -> dependencies -> ordered local branches -> one primary diagnostic

decision_procedure: validate the closed RCTSDescriptorV5 and its native conditional constraints
evaluate declared dependency predicates left-to-right and propagate their selected diagnostic
normalize requirement and implementation receiver/ownership/error/effect/authority/isolation rows
reject every widening beyond the requirement in fixed ownership,error,effect,authority,isolation order
return the exact compatible evidence signature

summary: Admit is/!is only as a nonconsuming exact alternative identity test over one normalized closed Union and compute bounded complementary Phi facts.
requires: subject static type normalizes to one finite closed Union
target normalizes to exactly one declared alternative identity
evaluate the subject once and read its stored injection identity once
perform no subtyping, refinement, reflection, Trait, witness, or provider search
bind no value and commit no ownership, authority, effect, or allocation
retain durable Phi facts only for a stable place not invalidated by a kill event
preconditions: the comparison-chain owner has already rejected direct chaining before this predicate runs
parse the is/!is right operand through the TypeRef goal
normalize aliases and the subject Union identity
read the current Phi alternative set
normalization: flatten and normalize the closed Union, exact target identity, and current Phi alternative set
decision_procedure: reject a subject that is not exactly one normalized closed Union with TYPE_TEST_SUBJECT_MUST_BE_CLOSED_UNION
reject a target that is not exactly one declared alternative identity with UNION_TYPE_TEST_ALTERNATIVE_NOT_EXACT
evaluate the subject once and compare the stored injection identity once without consuming
for is, compute true Phi as current intersect target and false Phi as current minus target; swap those outputs for !is
propagate the left true fact into and then RHS and the left false fact into otherwise RHS; do not pre-narrow a strict and/or RHS
discard a durable fact after assignment, aliasing mutation, exclusive borrow, escape, capture, consume, or a may-mutate call
return Bool plus the bounded edge facts without changing the declared type
success_result: Bool plus bounded complementary Phi facts
evaluation_order: schema -> normalization -> subject domain -> target identity -> one discriminator read -> Phi transfer -> diagnostic

summary: Normalize one top-level visibility domain while requiring an explicit word for exactly nine type-producing owners in all six stable and preview source roots.
requires: the type-producing owner set is exactly ClassDecl, TraitDecl, EnumDecl, TypeAliasDecl, SchemaDecl, ActorDecl, ActorProtocolDecl, TypestateResourceDecl, and BitfieldDecl
the source-root set is exactly the stable and preview library, executable, and script roots
a type-producing owner has one explicit public, common, or private word before HIR identity admission
an omitted word on every other top-level owner carrying TopLevelVisibility normalizes to private
private is module-local, common is package-wide and nonexportable, and public is only externally eligible through an admitted export or module interface
wider API residue cannot expose a dependency identity from a narrower domain
preconditions: validate the closed descriptor and one of the six source roots
derive type-producing ownership from the exact nine-owner set rather than trusting a caller flag
normalization: normalize an explicit visibility verbatim; normalize omission to private only when the declaration kind is outside the exact type-producing owner set
decision_procedure: validate the descriptor and recompute type_producing_owner from the exact nine-owner set
reject a recomputed type-producing owner with no explicit visibility using TYPE_DECL_VISIBILITY_REQUIRED before creating a HIR type node, type identity, or API-digest entry
for every other top-level owner carrying TopLevelVisibility, normalize an omitted word to private; otherwise preserve the explicit private, common, or public domain
derive external_api_eligibility as false for private and common and as the explicit export-or-module-interface admission bit for public

derive an API closure obligation in which public residue may reference only public identities, common residue may reference only common or public identities, and private residue may reference any identity accessible in its declaring module
return the normalized domain and closure obligation to HIR/API admission without inventing an export, package identity, or visibility word
termination_metric: one finite descriptor, one nine-owner membership test, and one finite API-dependency visibility list
success_result: one normalized visibility domain, one external-API eligibility bit, and one finite API-visibility closure obligation
evaluation_order: schema -> exact source root -> exact owner classification -> omission gate -> domain normalization -> API closure obligation -> HIR identity admission
